---
title: Engineering data science & AI platforms
subtitle: Part II\: Designing, building & operating data & AI platforms
description: |
    Slides for a full-day lecture
image: images/engineering-part-2.png
author:
    - Daniel Kapitan
date: 2026-04-17
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<iframe width="100%" height="800" src="https://anthology-of-data.science/lecture-engineering-data-ai-platforms/#/title-slide" title="Lecture"></iframe>
```
